title: Creamy British Beetroot Bubble And Squeak
description: A lacto-vegetarian-friendly Welsh dish featuring cooked beetroot in a creamy bubble and squeak form, steamed to perfection in a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot, boil the diced beetroot and potatoes until they are tender.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
Drain the cooked beetroot and potatoes, then add them to the pan with the onion and garlic.
Mash the mixture together with a spoon until it is mostly smooth.
Stir in the double cream, salt, and black pepper until the mixture is creamy and well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a ceramic tagine and steam it in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
